steps.title: Identify what the evidence must show
steps.content: The claim requires evidence showing Kelly observing a family woman using buttons for decoration during his childhood.

steps.title: Find the choice that provides it
steps.content:
Choice C directly provides this: his grandmother used buttons decoratively during his childhood, exactly matching what the claim requires.

The other three either describe Kelly's finished designs (A), reverse the causation to show Kelly influencing others (B), or address family influence on general design skills without connecting to buttons (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
